variants.name: 吉姆·贝克斯利·斯皮德
variants.ability: 每个夜晚*，你要选择两名存活的玩家：你会得知一名除你以外的当晚选择或影响了他们的玩家（或者你会得知没有）。
variants.otherNightReminder: Wake up Jim Bexley Speed and have them select two players. If either of them selected another player tonight, point to one of the players. Otherwise, shake your head and put Jim Bexley Speed back to sleep.
